title: I ❤ TFC (I Heart TFC)
description: I ❤ TFC is a clientside mod that replaces the TerraFirmaCraft HUD with attractive, dynamic, pictograhic bars! Highly configurable.
body:
![A screenshot of the main TerraFirmaCraft HUD elements. Health is represented by hearts, thirst by water droplets, and hunger by food icons. A temperature bar replaces the experience bar.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/XjM4YE3F/images/5f5ed44d87376b5488fc9a17ca5cc6b1b27583a0.png)

I Heart TFC is a clientside mod that reworks the HUD for TerraFirmaCraft (TFC) to be more visually appealing, more similar to vanilla, and more information dense! Highly configurable.
